hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+push.*[[:space:]:]master([[:space:]]|$)'; then echo 'BLOCKED by .claude/settings.json: pushing to master is forbidden (AGENTS.md §1 — master is PR-only and auto-deploys to the Azure VM). Open a PR from release/* or hotfix/* instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi
